title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS argues that junior cloud engineers should shift focus from raw coding ability toward understanding fundamentals like security, reliability, and cost while using AI agents as productivity tools. The video emphasizes architectural reasoning and reviewing AI-generated infrastructure code against principles rather than coding skills as the primary differentiator.
